scripts.dev: npm run build -w @invoice-forge/domain && npm run build -w @invoice-forge/contracts && concurrently -n api,web -c auto "npm run dev -w @invoice-forge/api" "npm run dev -w @invoice-forge/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @invoice-forge/domain && npm run build -w @invoice-forge/contracts && npm run build -w @invoice-forge/api && npm run build -w @invoice-forge/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @invoice-forge/domain && npm run test -w @invoice-forge/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @invoice-forge/domain && npm run build -w @invoice-forge/contracts && npm run typecheck -w @invoice-forge/api && npm run typecheck -w @invoice-forge/web
scripts.setup: npm run db:generate && npm run db:deploy && npm run db:seed
